fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first date in the selected period where a supply or demand event occurs that changes the item's availability figures.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Contains the number of the record in the Inventory Page Data table.

fields.name: Period Type
fields.tooltip:
Indicates what type of period is used to view the lines, as selected in the View by field on the header. You can select from the following periods:

Day


Week


Month


Quarter


Year

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies on which date the period starts, such as the first day of March, if the period is Month.

fields.name: Period End
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Period No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Level
fields.tooltip: Shows if the availability line is an expandable header line (level 0) or a collapsible line (level 1).

fields.name: Source Line ID
fields.tooltip: Shows the ID of the document line that the availability figure is based on.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Displays the item number of the item that the window shows availability figures for.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location of the demand document, from which the Item Availability by Event window was opened.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the availability line.

fields.name: Availability Date
fields.tooltip: Displays on which date the quantity is available according to the source document.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the source document or source line.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document that the availability figure is based on.

fields.name: Source
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of document or line the availability figure is based on.

fields.name: Remaining Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the finished quantity and the planned quantity on the production order.

fields.name: Positive
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the quantity that is contributing to the availability calculation is positive.

fields.name: Gross Requirement
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's total demand.

fields.name: Scheduled Receipt
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of items on existing supply orders.

fields.name: Forecast
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is demanded on the demand forecast that the availability figure is based on.

fields.name: Remaining Forecast
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that remains on the demand forecast, after the forecast quantity on the availability line has been consumed.

fields.name: Action Message Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is suggested in the planning or requisition line that this availability figure is based on.

fields.name: Action Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies the action message of the planning or requisition line that this availability figure is based on.

fields.name: Source Document ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the document that the availability figure is based on.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Ref. Order No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Projected Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's availability. This quantity includes all known supply and demand but does not include anticipated demand from demand forecasts or blanket sales orders or suggested supplies from planning or requisition worksheets.

fields.name: Forecasted Projected Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's inventory, including anticipated demand from demand forecasts or blanket sales orders.

fields.name: Suggested Projected Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's inventory, including the suggested supplies that occur in planning or requisition worksheet lines.

fields.name: Reserved Requirement
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that is reserved from requirement.

fields.name: Reserved Receipt
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that is reserved from receipt.
